final:
// // This module implements a 4-bit DRAM cell with 4-bit data width and 2-bit address width. It supports writing data on the rising edge of the clock when we is high and outputs the stored data on the rising edge of the clock when we is low.
module dram_cell (  
    input wire clk,  
    input wire we,  
    input wire [3:0] data_in,  
    output reg [3:0] data_out,  
    input wire [1:0] addr  
);  
    reg [3:0] memory [0:3]; // 4-bit memory for 4 addresses  

    always @(posedge clk) begin  
        if (we) begin  
            memory[addr] <= data_in; // Write data to memory  
        end  
        else begin  
            data_out <= memory[addr]; // Read data from memory  
        end  
    end  
endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a 4-bit DRAM cell with 4-bit data width and 2-bit address width. It supports writing data on the rising edge of the clock when we is high and outputs the stored data on the rising edge of the clock when we is low.
